tools.name: social_platforms
tools.description: List all supported social media platforms and their required credentials and settings. Call this first before posting.

id.description: Optional: get details for a specific platform (x, farcaster, reddit)

tools.name: social_post
tools.description: Post to a social media platform immediately or schedule for future delivery. Returns the post ID and URL on success.

credentials.description: Platform credentials. X: {consumer_key, consumer_secret, access_token, access_secret}. Farcaster: {neynar_key, signer_uuid}. Reddit: {access_token}.

media_urls.description: Optional URLs of images/videos to attach (upload first with social_upload)

reply_to.description: Optional: reply to this post ID / tweet ID / cast hash

schedule_at.description: Optional ISO 8601 timestamp to schedule future delivery (e.g. 2026-05-11T09:00:00Z)

settings.description: Platform-specific settings. Reddit: {subreddit, title, kind}. Farcaster: {channel_id, parent_url}.

tools.name: social_list
tools.description: List scheduled, published, and failed social posts.

tools.name: social_get
tools.description: Get details of a single social post by ID.

id.description: Post ID from social_post or social_list

tools.name: social_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post before it is published.

tools.name: social_analytics
tools.description: Get analytics for posts. Pass post_url + mint to correlate a tweet with a Pump.fun token price movement.

post_id.description: Post DB ID to get engagement analytics

post_url.description: X (Twitter) post URL for price correlation

mint.description: Pump.fun token mint address for price correlation

tools.name: social_upload
tools.description: Get a presigned upload URL for media files. Returns a public URL to use in media_urls when posting.

content_type.description: MIME type: image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif, image/webp, video/mp4
